welcome.subject: Bienvenue dans {{community}} !
welcome.body: Merci d'avoir rejoint {{community}}. Votre compte a été créé et vous pouvez maintenant commencer à explorer la plateforme.

verification.subject: Vérifiez votre adresse e-mail
verification.body: Veuillez vérifier votre adresse e-mail en cliquant sur le bouton ci-dessous.

password_reset.subject: Réinitialisez votre mot de passe
password_reset.body: Vous avez demandé une réinitialisation de mot de passe. Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous pour définir un nouveau mot de passe.
password_reset.ignore: Si vous n'avez pas effectué cette demande, vous pouvez ignorer cet e-mail.

transaction.subject: Transaction de crédit temps — {{amount}}h
transaction.received: Vous avez reçu {{amount}} heure(s) de la part de {{sender}}.

review_request.subject: Laissez une évaluation pour {{name}}
review_request.body: Vous avez récemment échangé des services avec {{other_party}}. Veuillez prendre un moment pour laisser une évaluation.

footer.sent_by: Envoyé par {{community}} propulsé par Project NEXUS

weekly_digest.title: Community Pulse - Weekly Digest
weekly_digest.heading: Community Pulse
weekly_digest.preview_text: Your weekly community highlights - new offers, requests, and upcoming events
weekly_digest.intro: Here's what's happening in your community this week.
weekly_digest.opted_in_notice: You received this email because you opted into weekly digests.

match_digest.title: Your {{period}} Match Digest
match_digest.heading: Your {{period}} Digest
match_digest.intro: Here's a summary of your new matches from the past {{period}}. Don't miss out on these opportunities!
match_digest.receiving_digest: You're receiving this {{period}} digest because you have matches enabled.

match_hot.title: Hot Match Found!
match_hot.heading: Hot Match Found!
match_hot.intro: Great news! We found a highly compatible listing that matches your preferences. This is a hot match - don't miss out!
match_hot.receiving_notice: You're receiving this because you enabled hot match notifications.

match_mutual.title: Mutual Match Found!
match_mutual.preview: Perfect exchange opportunity with {{name}}! You can both help each other - {{score}}% compatibility.
match_mutual.heading: Mutual Match!
match_mutual.intro: We found a mutual exchange opportunity with {{partner}}. You can both help each other - this is a win-win!
match_mutual.rare_notice: Mutual matches are rare! This is a win-win opportunity where both parties benefit from the exchange.
match_mutual.receiving_notice: You're receiving this because you enabled mutual match notifications.
